LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.comps.2.label: crew count
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.comps.3.label: small VTOL thrusters
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.comps.4.label: heavy VTOL thrusters
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.comps.5.label: navigation core
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.description: Quality factors determine the reactor's cooldown duration and the chance for a mishap when landing.
At the current quality, the Hellion will not be able to launch again for {0_time} after landing.
Additionally, there is a {0_percentage} chance of having a minor incident when landing the Hellion.
